fmiModelDescription.description: Adapter component for visual/frontend coupling to FlightGear using generic socket communication.

ScalarVariable.name: statePosition.x_km
ScalarVariable.description: Aircraft position from the simulated environment.

ScalarVariable.name: statePosition.y_km
ScalarVariable.description: Aircraft position from the simulated environment.

ScalarVariable.name: statePosition.z_km
ScalarVariable.description: Aircraft position from the simulated environment.

ScalarVariable.name: stateOrientation.roll_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Aircraft attitude from the simulated environment.

ScalarVariable.name: stateOrientation.pitch_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Aircraft attitude from the simulated environment.

ScalarVariable.name: stateOrientation.yaw_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Aircraft attitude from the simulated environment.

ScalarVariable.name: flightStatus.airspeed_mps
ScalarVariable.description: Flight status exported for overlays and diagnostics.

ScalarVariable.name: flightStatus.energy_state_norm
ScalarVariable.description: Flight status exported for overlays and diagnostics.

ScalarVariable.name: flightStatus.angle_of_attack_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Flight status exported for overlays and diagnostics.

ScalarVariable.name: flightStatus.climb_rate
ScalarVariable.description: Flight status exported for overlays and diagnostics.

ScalarVariable.name: flightStatus.health_code
ScalarVariable.description: Flight status exported for overlays and diagnostics.

ScalarVariable.name: missionStatus.waypoint_index
ScalarVariable.description: Mission/autopilot status exported for overlays and diagnostics.

ScalarVariable.name: missionStatus.total_waypoints
ScalarVariable.description: Mission/autopilot status exported for overlays and diagnostics.

ScalarVariable.name: missionStatus.distance_to_waypoint_km
ScalarVariable.description: Mission/autopilot status exported for overlays and diagnostics.

ScalarVariable.name: missionStatus.arrived
ScalarVariable.description: Mission/autopilot status exported for overlays and diagnostics.

ScalarVariable.name: missionStatus.complete
ScalarVariable.description: Mission/autopilot status exported for overlays and diagnostics.

ScalarVariable.name: pilotCommand.stick_pitch_norm
ScalarVariable.description: Pilot command returned from the interactive frontend into the vehicle control path.

ScalarVariable.name: pilotCommand.stick_roll_norm
ScalarVariable.description: Pilot command returned from the interactive frontend into the vehicle control path.

ScalarVariable.name: pilotCommand.rudder_norm
ScalarVariable.description: Pilot command returned from the interactive frontend into the vehicle control path.

ScalarVariable.name: pilotCommand.throttle_norm
ScalarVariable.description: Pilot command returned from the interactive frontend into the vehicle control path.

ScalarVariable.name: pilotCommand.throttle_aux_norm
ScalarVariable.description: Pilot command returned from the interactive frontend into the vehicle control path.

ScalarVariable.name: pilotCommand.button_mask
ScalarVariable.description: Pilot command returned from the interactive frontend into the vehicle control path.

ScalarVariable.name: pilotCommand.hat_x
ScalarVariable.description: Pilot command returned from the interactive frontend into the vehicle control path.

ScalarVariable.name: pilotCommand.hat_y
ScalarVariable.description: Pilot command returned from the interactive frontend into the vehicle control path.

ScalarVariable.name: pilotCommand.mode_switch
ScalarVariable.description: Pilot command returned from the interactive frontend into the vehicle control path.

ScalarVariable.name: pilotCommand.reserved
ScalarVariable.description: Pilot command returned from the interactive frontend into the vehicle control path.
